## What does this add or change?

<!-- One sentence: what skill is this, or what does the change do? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Folder name uses letters, numbers, and hyphens only
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has valid frontmatter: `name`, `description`, `tags`, `updated`
- [ ] `name` in frontmatter matches the folder name exactly
- [ ] `description` starts with "Use when..."
- [ ] Tags assigned from the standard set (or new tag justified in description)
- [ ] Any files referenced in `SKILL.md` exist in `references/`
- [ ] `bun run generate` run locally — manifest updated
